title: TC007-Catalog upload validation: missing required no identifier shows error
description: Verifies that running analysis with a catalog missing the required no column shows a validation error.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:9877
        await page.goto("http://localhost:9877", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Open the 'رفع الملفات' (Upload files) section so the file upload control is visible, then locate the file uploader to upload a CSV missing the 'no' column.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div/section/div/div[2]/div/div/div[6]/div/div/label[2]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Validation Error: Missing required identifier column: no').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=No grouped results available for export').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
The file upload control for the catalog CSV could not be found, so the analysis could not be run with a catalog missing the required 'no' identifier column.

Observations:
- The Streamlit app loaded at http://localhost:9877 (tab F437) and the 'رفع الملفات' radio input [index 314] is checked.
- No input type=file was found among the interactive elements after scrolling; uploader not visible (148 interactive elements were inspected).
- Page contains other inputs and buttons (for example text input index 750 and "🚀 بدء الكشط والتحليل" button index 686) but no CSV/file uploader control.
- The catalog CSV upload step (required to trigger validation) could not be performed because the uploader is absent.

title: TC011-AI review flow: run AI verification for review items and accept reclassification
description: Verifies that the user can trigger AI review for items in the review group and accept AI suggestions to reclassify.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:9877
        await page.goto("http://localhost:9877", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Open the 'رفع الملفات' (Upload files) section by clicking its radio control (element index 320).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div/section/div/div[2]/div/div/div[6]/div/div/label[2]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Confidence:').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Reclassified').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
The file uploader control required to upload the catalog CSV could not be found on the page.

Observations:
- The 'رفع الملفات' (Upload files) tab was selected and the Streamlit UI finished rendering, but no input[type=file] element appeared.
- Multiple scroll attempts were performed (page moved) but the uploader did not become visible.
- Visible controls include competitor scraping inputs and a "🚀 بدء الكشط والتحليل" button, suggesting scraping UI is present instead of a CSV uploader.
- The interactive elements list contains many inputs (textareas, number inputs, combobox) but no file upload control was found.
- No files were uploaded (0/1), so analysis and AI review steps could not be executed.

title: TC012-AI reclassification on selected items only
description: Verifies that automatic reclassification can be run for a selected subset of review items and only those items change classification.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:9877
        await page.goto("http://localhost:9877", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Open the 'رفع الملفات' (Upload files) section to reveal the file upload control so a CSV can be uploaded.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div/section/div/div[2]/div/div/div[6]/div/div/label[2]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Open the '⚠️ تحت المراجعة' sidebar option to view review items so a subset can be selected for automatic reclassification.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div/section/div/div[2]/div/div/div[6]/div/div/label[7]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Open the 'رفع الملفات' (Upload files) sidebar section so the CSV uploader control can be located and a catalog CSV uploaded.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div/section/div/div[2]/div/div/div[6]/div/div/label[2]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        await expect(frame.locator('text=AI Verification Results').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Unchanged').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
Cannot run automatic reclassification because the required catalog upload control is not available on the page.

Observations:
- The main area displays the message 'ارفع الملفات أولاً' (Upload files first) in section element [45].
- The sidebar shows the 'رفع الملفات' option selected (radio input element [233] is checked=true), indicating the Upload page is open.
- No input[type=file] or file uploader control was found among the visible interactive elements; there is no upload button/control to provide the required CSV (inspected interactive element list contains 96 interactive elements but no file uploader index).
- The review list and automatic reclassification controls are not visible, so the workflow cannot proceed to select items or run reclassification.

Because the upload control is missing, the prerequisite CSV cannot be provided and the automatic reclassification feature cannot be exercised or verified.

title: TC013-AI chat utility opens and returns a response for a product inquiry
description: Verifies that the AI chat/interaction utility can be used to ask about a product and a response is displayed.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:9877
        await page.goto("http://localhost:9877", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Open the 'رفع الملفات' (Upload files) section by selecting its radio button so upload controls become visible (click element index 273).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div/section/div/div[2]/div/div/div[6]/div/div/label[2]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Open the '🤖 الذكاء الصناعي' section to reveal AI chat utilities (click radio input index 315).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div/section/div/div[2]/div/div/div[6]/div/div/label[9]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Enter a product-related question into the AI chat input (index 1136), send it (index 1147), wait for a reply, and then finish the test.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div/div/section/div/div/div[4]/div/div[3]/div/div[3]/div/div/div/div/div/div/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('ما المعلومات المتاحة عن المنتج رقم 123؟')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div/div/section/div/div/div[4]/div/div[3]/div/div[3]/div/div[2]/div/div/div/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        await expect(frame.locator('text=المنتج رقم 123').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=ما المعلومات المتاحة عن المنتج رقم 123؟').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
تعذر الحصول على رد من دردشة AI — لم تُعرض إجابة بعد إرسال السؤال.

Observations:
- حقل الإدخال يحتوي على النص المرسل: "ما المعلومات المتاحة عن المنتج رقم 123؟" (عنصر index 1136).
- زر الإرسال تم النقر عليه (عنصر index 1147).
- على واجهة الدردشة تظهر رسالة باللون الأحمر: "فشل الاتصال".
- لا توجد فقاعات أو أي نص يظهر كإجابة من النموذج بعد الإرسال.
- تبويب الدردشة محدد (عنصر index 1085) وحالة البيانات تشير: "البيانات: لم يتم تحليل بيانات بعد".

title: TC014-AI utilities are discoverable on the main page after analysis
description: Verifies that AI verification/deep analysis controls become available in the UI once results exist to review.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:9877
        await page.goto("http://localhost:9877", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Switch to the 'رفع الملفات' (Upload Files) section by clicking the Upload Files radio input so the file upload control becomes available.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div/section/div/div[2]/div/div/div[6]/div/div/label[2]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Deep Analysis').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Review Group').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
Unable to locate a CSV file upload control on the 'رفع الملفات' (Upload Files) section, so the required catalog upload and verification of AI review / deep analysis controls could not be performed.

Observations:
- The 'رفع الملفات' (Upload Files) radio option is selected (interactive element index 262 is checked).
- No input type=file or file chooser was found in the interactive elements list (page shows text inputs and a textarea instead). Interactive elements count: 148; no file input index present.
- Elements present that appear related to URL/CSV import by text: textarea index 730 (روابط مجمّعة أو جدول منسوخ), single-store URL input index 740, competitor name input index 755, number input index 777, and the start scraping/analysis button at index 678 (🚀 بدء الكشط والتحليل).
- CSV upload was not performed (0 out of 1 required uploads). Because the file uploader is missing, AI-assisted review / deep analysis controls that require results cannot be validated.
- UI state: the page is fully rendered; the upload workflow appears to expect pasted links or scraping input rather than a file chooser, but no explicit file upload control was detected in the DOM interactive elements.

Because the required file upload control is not present, the test cannot proceed further to run analysis or verify the AI review/deep analysis controls.
